dual_intent_strategy.primary_intent: Buy a Maltipoo in Singapore ('maltipoo singapore' 480/mo MEDIUM; 'maltipoo for sale singapore' 90 +125% YoY; 'maltipoo puppies' 170)
dual_intent_strategy.secondary_intent: Price + breed research ('maltipoo price singapore' 50 KD4; supporting: lifespan 170 KD1, vs cavapoo 90, size 50, grooming 30 +150% YoY, temperament 20)
dual_intent_strategy.resolution: Transactional listings + price above the fold; Definition Box within first 30%; both keywords in first 150 words. Price transparency is the SEO gap and conversion lever (only onlypaws shows a price in the top 10).

meta_title: Maltipoo Singapore | Puppies from $2,888 | Curious Tails
meta_description: Maltipoo puppies for sale in Singapore from $2,888, AVS licensed and HDB-approved. Real prices, temperament, grooming and the $500+ starter kit included. WhatsApp us.
h1: Maltipoo Puppies for Sale in Singapore

entity_definitions.definition: Curious Tails is an AVS-licensed pet shop at 2 Balestier Road, Singapore, offering Maltipoo puppies at $2,888 to $4,488 with a 30-plus item starter kit, free home delivery and setup, and a free AVS-certified training lesson included.

A Maltipoo is a cross between a Maltese and a Toy or Miniature Poodle. It is a small, affectionate companion dog, roughly 3 to 6 kg, with a soft low-shedding coat, a people-oriented temperament that thrives on company, and a lifespan of 12 to 15 years.

serp_analysis.dominant_content_format: Pet-shop product/listing pages plus a few breed guides; heavy teacup/micro marketing
top_competitor_weaknesses: Only one of the top 10 shows a price (onlypaws $3,288); the rest force an enquiry
Aggressive 'smallest' / 'micro teacup imported from Japan' framing with no honesty about size risk
Thin on the one thing that actually decides Maltipoo happiness: how much company the dog gets
No post-purchase onboarding, delivery/setup, or aftercare content
information_gaps_none_cover: Transparent price with a full inclusions table
Honest 'is a Maltipoo right for you' matching on hours-alone-per-day (Maltipoos need company)
Straight talk on teacup/micro Maltipoo health risks
What the first week and aftercare actually look like

featured_snippet.maltipoo singapore: no owned snippet; target PARAGRAPH via Definition Box
featured_snippet.maltipoo price singapore: no owned snippet; target TABLE via price/inclusions ComparisonSplit
featured_snippet.note: Mirror-the-SERP: no existing snippet for either, both open.

secondary: how much is a maltipoo in singapore

lsi_keyword_weighting.instruction: Transactional → Phases 1,4,5; informational → Phases 2,3. Both clusters ≥70% independently. One natural use per term.
